meaning: adj.[解]漏斗形的,有漏斗状器官的(指植物)的
examples: No evidence of infundibular enhancement is noted on either the coronal or the sagittal images.
Radiologically, the disease is characterized by homogeneously enhancing pituitary mass with infundibular thickening.
The ependymal surface morphology of the third ventricular infundibular region was investigated in the prepubertal rat by scanning electron microscope.
